title: Baricitinib for Moderate and Severe Traumatic Intracerebral Hemorrhage/Contusions

skipped_criteria: Admission within ≤24 hours after traumatic brain injury: requires temporal logic (time from injury to admission) not available in schema.
CT scans demonstrate intracerebral hemorrhage/contusions: imaging confirmation cannot be expressed with available fields.
Closed head injury (inclusion) / Open head injury (exclusion): no open/closed head injury field in schema.
Admission without infections: no infection status field in schema.
Signed and dated informed consent: consent process cannot be expressed in schema.
Time of head injury cannot be reliably assessed (exclusion): temporal reliability of injury time cannot be expressed in schema.
Candidate for immediate surgical intervention due to severe extracranial injury (exclusion): surgical candidacy field not in schema.
Parturition within previous 30 days or active lactation (exclusion): postpartum/lactation status not in schema.
Use of Janus kinase inhibitors (exclusion): specific medication use not in schema.
Pre-traumatic dementia or disability (exclusion): prior medical history field not in schema.

Severe pulmonary infection (exclusion): infection/pulmonary status not in schema.
Severe or acute heart failure (exclusion): cardiac comorbidity field not in schema.
Severe infections within previous 30 days (exclusion): infection history field not in schema.
History of myocardial infarction (exclusion): prior cardiac history field not in schema.

Severe decreases in neutrophil, lymphocyte, platelet counts or hemoglobin (exclusion): lab values not in schema.
